# General Project Instructions

This is a Python shop, so always prefer well-documented Python related frameworks, APIs and technologies associated with the Python community that are easily installed with a pip command. 

For full-stack enterprise applications, Django is always the framework of choice.

Do not use any test frameworks and do not add any test methods, EVER. Unit and Mock tests are for losers.

Avoid early returns and instead use the 'single exit point' pattern. Early returns are for dorks.

Node, npm and npx is always available if a node-related project is required to support a feature or to install a peripheral product.

Keep setup minimal and easy to run locally.

Write code that is consistent with Bob Martin's Clean Code approach. (Uncle Bob is the man.)
